mapper.select: SELECT meal_type AS mealType, SUM(calories) AS calories FROM diet_log WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND log_date = #{date} GROUP BY meal_type

SELECT SUM(dl.servings * f.protein) AS totalProtein, SUM(dl.servings * f.fat) AS totalFat, SUM(dl.servings * f.carbs) AS totalCarbs FROM diet_log dl LEFT JOIN food f ON dl.food_id = f.id WHERE dl.user_id = #{userId} AND dl.log_date = #{date}
SELECT log_date AS date, SUM(calories) AS calories FROM diet_log WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND log_date BETWEEN #{startDate} AND #{endDate} GROUP BY log_date ORDER BY log_date
SELECT log_date AS date, SUM(calories) AS calories FROM diet_log WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND log_date BETWEEN #{startDate} AND #{endDate} GROUP BY log_date ORDER BY log_date
